title: Quick protocol for protein extraction from adherent fish-derived fibroblasts
author: Joao M Moreno

steps.title: Carefully remove all culture media from...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove all culture media from the flask and add enough ice-cold 1X PBS to wash the cells

steps.title: Carefully remove the ice-cold 1x PBS...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the ice-cold 1x PBS and add ice-cold lysis buffer (RIPA buffer) according to the estimated number of cells: 1 mL for 10^7 cells (roughly a T75 flask).

steps.title: Use a cell scraper to dissociate...
steps.instruction: Use a cell scraper to dissociate the cells from the bottom of the flask.

steps.title: Resuspend the cells in the lysis...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cells in the lysis buffer and transfer the suspension to a microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 20 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 20 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Carefully transfer the supernatant containing the...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the supernatant containing the soluble protein to a new tube and keep on the ice. Discard the pellet. Note: The protein solution can be kept in the freezer for longer storage periods until further use.
